title: Eva Another Cases
wikitext:
[]: Eva -Another Cases- Post by ~at0mic punk~ » Mon Sep 24, 2007 11:37 pm Ok, this is my first post, so bear with me if this is in the wrong section, anyway for those who don't know Evangelions -Another Cases- is an updated version of the PS2 game Evangelions, the game itself has 18 stories that you can beat, each usually a different character(Shinji has 3). And the idea is to keep you AT Field at full while building relationships with others, this will then lead you to yuor "good" ending, and don't worry, you fight all of the angels if you're an Eva pilot, if you're not, then you sit there and hope for the best...anyway if anyone has this game or has beaten it and has the endings, would anyone want to discuss them?

[]: Post by Ornette » Mon Sep 24, 2007 11:44 pm Discussion of this game is here: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=1393

Article: Eva Another Cases 
[]: Eva -Another Cases- Post by ~at0mic punk~ » Mon Sep 24, 2007 11:37 pm Ok, this is my first post, so bear with me if this is in the wrong section, anyway for those who don't know Evangelions -Another Cases- is an updated version of the PS2 game Evangelions, the game itself has 18 stories that you can beat, each usually a different character(Shinji has 3). And the idea is to keep you AT Field at full while building relationships with others, this will then lead you to yuor "good" ending, and don't worry, you fight all of the angels if you're an Eva pilot, if you're not, then you sit there and hope for the best...anyway if anyone has this game or has beaten it and has the endings, would anyone want to discuss them?

[]: Post by Ornette » Mon Sep 24, 2007 11:44 pm Discussion of this game is here: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=1393
